title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen Release notes link
scenario: Release notes links on DFU screen do not open correct web pages when accessed from Home or Settings on Osprey EB and CC devices
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate the DFU (Device Firmware Update) notification or update prompt for the connected Osprey EB device (firmware ≥ 5039).
3. Tap the update button on the Home screen to open the DFU screen.
4. On the DFU screen, tap the release notes link for the Osprey EB update.
5. Verify that the correct web page (Poly support release notes for Osprey EB) opens in the device browser.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
7. Repeat steps 2–5 for the Osprey CC device (firmware ≥ 5039).
8. Navigate to the Settings screen (Poly Studio Mobile → Settings).
9. Locate the DFU option or update section within Settings.
10. Tap the update button to open the DFU screen from Settings.
11. Tap the release notes link for the Osprey EB update.
12. Verify that the correct web page opens in the device browser.
13. Return to Settings and repeat steps 9–12 for the Osprey CC device.
expected: All release notes links on the DFU screen (accessed from both Home screen and Settings screen) open the correct corresponding Poly support web pages for Osprey EB and Osprey CC devices.
